directions.label: Conservative banker
directions.use_when: 正式路演、董事会、监管敏感场景
directions.avoid_when: 需要强传播或品牌发布感
directions.risk: 可能偏稳，视觉记忆点弱

directions.label: Editorial strategy
directions.use_when: 需要把复杂故事讲清楚，并强化章节节奏
directions.avoid_when: 超密集附录或纯数据复核
directions.visual_posture: strong hierarchy, editorial rhythm, controlled contrast
directions.risk: 过度 editorial 会削弱投行材料严肃感

directions.label: Modern technical
directions.use_when: AI、半导体、产品架构或产业链主题
directions.avoid_when: 传统财务汇报或监管问询回复
directions.risk: 技术图过多会遮蔽商业结论

notes: Early exploration can be text-only; important decks should add a visual contact sheet.
